# bodyTextProvider

**Instance Property**

The text to display in the body line.

## Declaration

```swift
@NSCopying var bodyTextProvider: CLKTextProvider { get set }
```

## Setting the Complication Data

- **headerTextProvider**: The text to display in the header line.
